stable.title: Announcing ImageGlass 9.5
stable.description:
This is a minor update that includes a few community-requested features and bugfixes.
🌗 New: ImageGlass 10 RC is now available

beta.title: Announcing ImageGlass 10 Release Candidate
beta.description: This version introduces a refreshed Fluent 2 design, a comprehensive built-in Settings GUI, a brand-new Quick Setup experience, and critical security hardening for the plugin ecosystem.
